zh.St Clair, Argyllshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Donnchadh Mac Gilbert 1st Earl of Carrick於1174年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾卡里克時，他的父親Gille Brigte mac Fergusa of Galloway48歲，母親Eve mac Fergus24歲。他於1200年之前與Avelina FitzAlan Countess of Carrick在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1250年6月13日在蘇格蘭阿吉爾享年76歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.St Clair, Argyllshire, Scotland: 英国苏格兰阿吉爾 安德 布特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Donnchadh Mac Gilbert 1st Earl of Carrick于1174年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾卡里克时，他的父亲Gille Brigte mac Fergusa of Galloway48岁，母亲Eve mac Fergus24岁。他于1200年之前与Avelina FitzAlan Countess of Carrick在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1250年6月13日在苏格兰阿吉爾享年76岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

en.St Clair, Argyllshire, Scotland: Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom

nameMeanings.name: Donnchadh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Gaelic: compound of Old Celtic donn ‘brown’ + chadh ‘chief’ or ‘noble’.

variants.name: Duncan
meanings: Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Donnchadh , also used among people without Scottish connections. This was the name of a 7th-century Scottish saint (abbot of Iona) and two medieval kings of Scotland. The final ‐n in the Anglicized form seems to be the result of confusion with the Gaelic word ceann ‘head’ in the Latinized form Duncanus. Compare Irish Donagh .

nameMeanings.name: Mac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a common nickname for bearers of any of the Scottish and Irish patronymic surnames beginning with Mac or Mc, this is now sometimes used as an independent first name, especially in the U.S.

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Donnchadh Mac Gilbert 1st Earl of Carrick was born in 1174, in Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, Gille Brigte mac Fergusa of Galloway, was 48 and his mother, Eve mac Fergus, was 24. He married Avelina FitzAlan Countess of Carrick before 1200, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 13 June 1250, in Argyll, Scotland, at the age of 76, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Donnchadh Mac Gilbert 1st Earl of Carrick est né en 1174, à Carrick, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Gille Brigte mac Fergusa of Galloway, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Eve mac Fergus, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Avelina FitzAlan Countess of Carrick avant 1200, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 13 juin 1250, à Argyll, Écosse, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.St Clair, Argyllshire, Scotland: Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Donnchadh Mac Gilbert 1st Earl of Carrick 1174 in Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gille Brigte mac Fergusa of Galloway 48 und seine Mutter Eve mac Fergus 24. Er hat vor 1200 in Scotland Avelina FitzAlan Countess of Carrick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 13. Juni 1250 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Argyll, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Donnchadh Mac Gilbert 1st Earl of Carrick è nato il nel 1174 nel Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Gille Brigte mac Fergusa of Galloway, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Eve mac Fergus, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Avelina FitzAlan Countess of Carrick prima del 1200, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 13 giugno 1250, nel Argyll, Scotland, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Donnchadh Mac Gilbert 1st Earl of Carrickが1174年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアカーリックで生まれた時，父Gille Brigte mac Fergusa of Gallowayは48歳，母Eve mac Fergusは24歳であった。1200年以前にスコットランドでAvelina FitzAlan Countess of Carrickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1250年6月13日にスコットランドアルグイルで76歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Donnchadh Mac Gilbert 1st Earl of Carrick(이)가 1174년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 카릭에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gille Brigte mac Fergusa of Galloway(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Eve mac Fergus(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1200년 이전 스컷랜드에서 Avelina FitzAlan Countess of Carrick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1250년 6월 13일 스컷랜드 아그이에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Donnchadh Mac Gilbert 1st Earl of Carrick nasceu em 1174, em Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Gille Brigte mac Fergusa of Galloway, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Eve mac Fergus, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Avelina FitzAlan Countess of Carrick antes 1200, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 13 de junho de 1250, em Argyll, Scotland, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Donnchadh Mac Gilbert 1st Earl of Carrick родился в 1174 г. в местности каррикк, аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Gille Brigte mac Fergusa of Galloway было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Eve mac Fergus, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Avelina FitzAlan Countess of Carrick перед 1200 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 13 июня 1250 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Donnchadh Mac Gilbert 1st Earl of Carrick nació en 1174, en Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Gille Brigte mac Fergusa of Galloway, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Eve mac Fergus, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Avelina FitzAlan Countess of Carrick antes de 1200, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 13 de junio de 1250, en Argyll, Scotland, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
